LAW AND MOTION, 301, ATTY. GEORGE W. WOLFF'S AMENDED MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT CUNG THAI'S IS OFF CALENDAR. THIS MOTION WAS ALREADY ORDERED OFF CALENDAR WHEN MOVANT FAILED TO APPEAR ON AUGUST 4, 2008. THE PURPORTED "AMENDED NOTICE IS THEREFORE UNTIMELY AS THERE IS NO PENDING MOTION TO AMEND. IT ALSO FAILS TO PROVIDE THE REQUIRED PERIOD OF NOTICE, IS NOT SUPPORTED BY REQUIRED DOCUMENTS CURRENT AS OF AUGUST 18, 2008 AND IS NOT PRESENTED ON THE REQUIRED JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189
